patterns_recognized: 7/20 CHW@TEX OVERRIDE of CAP 7 using deGrom starter reputation lost 10-3; same Rocker-vs-Schultz matchup repeats today. Archive rule: do not override CAP 7 via starter quality without the >=0.02 threshold fix deployed.

7/20 postgame mandated 'lean CONFIRM on GOLD unless a suppression rule has >=70% recent track record on that exact shape.' Starred-F1-without-F3 DOWNGRADE rule is now 4-for-6 (not >=70%) after going 0-for-2 on 7/20. Apply it only when F1* has zero secondary signal; four-dimension affirm (SP+PQI+Stage) overrides it.
F3_swing_take_gap below 1000 is a non-anchor: validated at 7/9, 7/18, and today's NYM@MIL (F3=243.9). Sub-1000 F3 alone does not justify GOLD-tier elevation.

HARD CAP 1 has suppressed three consecutive pre-cap score-4+ winners (7/18-7/20 per postgame). Carve-out for marginally-negative-edge strong stacks has not shipped — treat CAP 1 as the current rule. Today's affected games (TB@TOR edge=0.70, WSH@COL edge=2.53) are below the 4pp floor, not negative-edge — a distinct but analogous suppression.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: fair_prob=0.409 sits below the 0.42 viability floor, independently validating SKIP regardless of other signals. PQI Δ=+17.6 strongly opposes MIN; CAP 10 fired on pick_prob=0.538 in the bottom bucket. CLE routed MIN 13-4 yesterday on the same opposing-signal shape. No qualitative counter-signal present.

LAD @ PHI.reasoning: Edge +23.27pp sits in the calibration-caution zone just below HARD CAP 6's 25pp hallucination threshold. f5_full_delta=0.5611 is the slate's largest Stage 1/2 split. SP xERA (Wheeler favors PHI), PQI (Δ=+15.7), and Stage 1/2 disagree all oppose LAD simultaneously. PHI beat LAD 10-7 yesterday on the same signal shape. Per settled dual-opposing rule: SKIP only, no fade.

PIT @ NYY.reasoning: Grade D with score=-1: SP xERA (Warren vs Chandler) and PQI both oppose NYY, and the sole positive signal is F5_bullpen_gap=+1.28. Per 7/19 archive, F5-alone is an insufficient GOLD anchor (2-for-2 in this exact LAD@NYY matchup shape). bullpen_fatigue and confidence_downgrade=True compound the concern. Downgrade GOLD label to SKIP.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Edge=+0.70pp is essentially flat — the market has fully priced Gausman's advantage, which is a standalone reason to hold SKIP regardless of pre-cap grade. CAP 7 also fires on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0014 (sub-0.02 band) and CAP 10 fires on pick_prob=0.537 in bottom bucket. confidence_downgrade=True. Downgrade GOLD to SKIP on flat-edge market signal.

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: Clean grade-A pre-cap stack with no hard caps firing: SP xERA (Suárez) agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=+11.2), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.03), edge 8.9pp in valid window, hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0015 (pick side better). F1*=0.76 starred is corroborated by three independent dimensions. 7/20 lesson: lean CONFIRM on GOLD unless a suppression rule has >=70% recent track record — the starred-F1 rule is now 4-for-6, below that threshold.
lessons_applied: 7/20: lean CONFIRM on GOLD absent >=70% suppression-rule track record

SD @ ATL.reasoning: PLATINUM demoted to GOLD by rolling-win-rate guardrail, warranting extra scrutiny. Pre-cap B+ (F3=2777.6 above 1000 threshold, PQI confirms, Stage agrees, edge 11.07pp valid) clears the bar to earn CAP 10 rescue (pick_prob=0.538 in bottom bucket; CONFIRM-rescued picks in this band hit 47.6% vs 31.2% non-CONFIRM). No SP-edge signal fired; Walker Buehler injury-regression is unverified — not acting on unconfirmed doubt.

SF @ KC.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5): SP xERA +0.65 agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=-14.5), Stage agree — three dimensions independent of the starred F1_xera_gap=1.01*, satisfying the four-dimension-affirming bar that legitimized the CLE@MIA CAP-10 rescues (7/10, 7/12). F3=822 alone is below 1000, but it is not the sole corroborator. CONFIRM activates CAP 10 rescue from zero to GOLD. PLATINUM demotion already reduces from PLATINUM.

NYM @ MIL.reasoning: The sole positive signal is F3=243.9 — among the weakest in the archive, well below the 1000 meaningful-anchor threshold. PQI opposes MIL (Δ=-9.0). acute_roster and confidence_downgrade=True both fire. f5_full_delta=0.1911 reflects Stage 1/2 divergence. This is a genuinely thin pre-cap B- stack (score=1), not a caps-suppressed strong pick — downgrade to SKIP.
lessons_applied: sub-1000 F3 not a meaningful anchor (7/9, 7/18)

DET @ CHC.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5): F1=1.82 NOT starred, F3=1761.1 above 1000, SP edge 1.13 agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=-13.2), Stage agree — genuine four-dimension stack with no Statcast redundancy concern. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0085 (pick side better, no CAP 7). PLATINUM→GOLD demotion is a rolling-rate flag, not a signal failure. CONFIRM activates CAP 10 rescue on pick_prob=0.541. DET won 8-6 here yesterday.

CHW @ TEX.reasoning: Identical CHW@TEX matchup to 7/20, where OVERRIDE of CAP 7 citing deGrom as an offsetting ace lost 10-3 (deGrom allowed 5 ER in 4.2 IP). Same pitching pair (Rocker vs Schultz) today. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0072 in the sub-0.02 band. Archive rule: do not override CAP 7 via starter reputation without the >=0.02 threshold fix. F1*=2.04 starred without F3 adds weight. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

MIA @ HOU.reasoning: F3=1270 and F5=+1.14 provide solid multi-signal support with no starred-F1 concern. Edge 5.66pp in valid window; pick_prob=0.5991 not in bottom bucket. PQI mildly opposes (Δ=-8.3), already penalized to B-/score=1. The model has correctly sized this down from PLATINUM; CONFIRM maintains that assessment. Previous HOU losses (7/17-7/19) were BAL series; MIA is a structurally different opponent.

WSH @ COL.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5): F2+F5 fire, SP 0.55 xERA agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=-6.3), Stage agree. The binding constraint is edge=2.53pp below the 4pp floor — a market-priced-flat signal, not a signal failure. 7/20 WSH@COL was DOWNGRADEd (WSH won 7-3) with the same F2+F5 configuration; post-game flagged that rule needed revision. CONFIRM the pick's directional quality; SKIP tier enforced by the edge floor.

STL @ LAA.reasoning: F1=2.49 NOT starred, SP edge 1.97 (exceptional), PQI +34.2 (slate's strongest confirmation) — pre-cap A grade. The binding constraints are CAP 7 (gap=0.0080, sub-0.02 band) and edge=17.77pp above the 15pp ceiling — both code-level gates, not signal failures. 7/20 STL@LAA was DOWNGRADEd and LAA won 3-2. CONFIRM the directional quality; SKIP is enforced by the edge ceiling and CAP 7, not by signal doubt.

OAK @ ARI.reasoning: OAK's starter Kohl Drake has 0 Statcast pitches this season — sp_savant_gate=HARD_VETO. This is a genuine current-season data void, not a thin sample. Negative edge (-2.80pp) and CAP 10 independently add to SKIP. Per 7/20 MIA@HOU: career track record does not override the current-season data gate. Non-negotiable SKIP.
lessons_applied: current-season data void vs thin-sample distinction

CIN @ SEA.reasoning: D-grade, score=-2: SP xERA (Castillo 1.39 advantage for CIN) and PQI Δ=-19.6 both strongly oppose SEA. fair_prob=0.503 shows Vegas prices this as a coin flip despite model's 60.84% — a 10pp model-vs-market gap consistent with calibration issues. Per settled archive rule, dual-opposing is suppression-only, never a directional fade toward CIN. CONFIRM SKIP.
